overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077 during a heavy rainstorm at night. The player navigates through neon-lit commercial streets, elevated highways, underpasses, and tunnels while passing other vehicles and pedestrians. The footage showcases ray-traced reflections on wet asphalt and vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic billboards and Japanese-inspired architecture.

glowing storefront signs in various colors including red and blue
covered walkway spanning the street above with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving through a rain-soaked commercial street at night. Holographic billboards float above while neon shop signs illuminate the left side of the street. The vehicle passes over a marked pedestrian crosswalk with bright yellow stripes, with an orange van visible parked on the left.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right at an intersection, passing a traditional Japanese red gate structure in the distance. The scene features mixed architecture with retail storefronts on the right and moderate traffic including other cars. A pedestrian with an umbrella is visible walking on the right sidewalk as the vehicle navigates through the wet streets.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto an elevated highway section, leaving the dense commercial area behind. Concrete noise barriers line both sides of the wide road while distant skyscrapers are visible on the horizon. The sky is fully visible overhead as the vehicle gains speed on the multi-lane highway.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass characterized by distinctive large red structural pillars on the right and smooth concrete walls on the left. The road curves to the right as the vehicle follows a black sedan and a silver car through the semi-enclosed space. Digital advertisements are mounted on the walls, and the distant skyscrapers appear closer as the vehicle progresses.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district dominated by bright pink neon storefronts on the left and modern glass office buildings on the right. The vehicle approaches an intersection with crosswalks while passing vending machines on the sidewalk. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking along the right side of the street.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a fully enclosed tunnel with smooth concrete walls and ceiling, blocking all view of the sky. Artificial lighting fixtures embedded in the walls illuminate the path ahead as the lighting dims compared to the previous neon-lit street. The tunnel creates a narrow, enclosed driving environment with no visible pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into an enclosed parking structure or plaza with concrete walls and pillars. Pink neon vertical lights mark the area ahead near a security booth. The vehicle slows down as it navigates the final approach, with a pedestrian visible walking on the left side near the entrance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a dense, neon-lit commercial district into the open expanse of an elevated highway. It begins by navigating a rain-soaked street where holographic billboards float above and neon signs reflect off the wet asphalt as the vehicle crosses a bright yellow pedestrian walkway. As the vehicle turns right at an intersection, the environment shifts toward a mix of retail storefronts and traditional Japanese architecture, passing a red gate and a pedestrian with an umbrella. The scene then opens up as the vehicle accelerates away from the city center, leaving the crowded shops behind to merge onto a wide, multi-lane road. Finally, the view expands to reveal concrete noise barriers and distant skyscrapers under a dark, rainy sky as the vehicle gains speed on the highway.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a shifting urban landscape that moves from a semi-enclosed underpass into a vibrant neon district before descending into a series of concrete tunnels and plazas. It begins by curving through a covered underpass flanked by large red structural pillars and digital advertisements while following other vehicles toward the city center. As the vehicle exits the underpass, the environment opens into a bright commercial district filled with pink neon storefronts, glass office buildings, and pedestrians along the sidewalks. The scene then shifts abruptly into a fully enclosed tunnel where the vibrant city lights are replaced by dim, artificial fixtures embedded in smooth concrete walls. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel into a concrete parking plaza marked by vertical pink neon lights and a security booth, slowing down as it approaches a lone pedestrian.
